What's going on gang? Dr. Cash here moving on to the nutrition side of the hybrid model fulfillment. Some cool stuff coming up. So after you have discussed the supplement needs with the client at the very beginning, right starting out ground zero, the nutrition implementation, but this is extremely straightforward. When you have a person that has zero experience, we want to do minimum minimum effective dose to get the ball rolling. Okay, these people have not much experience doing a structure dieting that has worked. Okay. And so the best way to go about this is to start out very simple. And then again, you're going to end up giving them freedom. Okay, as time goes on, but you're going to be replacing some of that structure with more measurement. And so I'll discuss that as time goes on. But the first thing I want to discuss is essentially at week zero at time zero for the first two weeks, all they are going to be doing is eating off a food list, which you will get and weighing themselves every day. That is it. And I, and I swear that because of these two things, this person will start making progress on their own without having to do anything complicated at all. And that is because of this phenomenon known as the Hawthorne effect that is essentially that when a person knows they're being watched, they change their behavior. And so instead of trying to account for this, we're going to weaponize it. So if we give a healthy food list to a brand new client and then also tell them to track their weight at the same time, then they will be structuring their own meals, how they wish with the food list as it is provided. And since they're weighing themselves every day, they're going to be in essence structuring their own meals without any outside intervention. So as to decrease the amount of stress involved with starting a new program. So to reiterate at ground zero, all they're doing is eating off the food list. I use the terminology don't stuff, don't starve, right? Eat like an adult, you know, have balanced meals as many balanced meals as you feel you need and weigh yourself every morning, typically after you go to the bathroom naked. And so for the first two weeks, that's literally all you have to do. And their weight will trend down during that time because they will start to be aware of the food choices they make and start eating balanced meals on their own without you having to put a gun to their head. So I'll see you discussing the next step in the next video.
